title: Conversation with your alternate self
wikitext:
[]: Conversation with your "alternate" self.             Quote Post by shinesman_cobalt » Fri Jul 20, 2007 5:09 am I got this idea from the "captions" thread. If it's already been done, go ahead and move it. What do you think Eva characters would say to their alternate versions if they could meet them? I.E., What would the Shinji from the manga, say to the Shinji from the anime or vice versa? What would episode 26 "Shinjiverse" Shinji say to Angelic Days Shinji? Etc. Be serious or be silly. Just be creative!

[]:             Quote Post by shinesman_cobalt » Fri Jul 20, 2007 5:11 am here's one: Anime Shinji: Wow, so you're me? Manga Shinji: Looks like it. So I must be you too. But if you're me and I'm you, How come I'm much cooler? AS: Huh, what do you mean by that? MS: Isn't it obvious? I'm edgy and sarcastic, not whiny and submissive. AS: Hey, I have a lot of problems! Did your father make you to to save the world from giant monsters using a giant "robot" with the your mom's soul in it? MS: Yes. Yes he did. And I STILL wasn't a whiny bitch about it! BTW, tell Touji I said "hi". You know, because he's ALIVE. AS: ... MS: You see. Much cooler. AS: *annoyed, quietly* Shut up. MS: You shut up! Episode 26 alternate Shinji: You're both pussies. Anime Shinji & Manga Shinji: Shut up! Ok, probably not the best one, but It's 4 in the morning and it seemed funny.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Jul 26, 2007 2:27 pm The two I did for the Captions Contest, I thought they were amusing. First one: Anime-Shinji: "The self is always composed of two people. The self which is actually seen, and the self observing that. Or in this case, my other self is my shitty-ass manga counterpart." Manga-Shinji: *suddenly rising, looks angry* "HEY! I don't care if you ARE me! STFU you little bitch!" Anime-Shinji: *staring, calm* "See, that's the thing, I'd never act like that unless I completely snap. Case in point: EoTV/EoE." *Manga-Shinji sits back down, silence* Manga-Shinji: ".......You're nuts you know that? Asuka's a total bitch (though I admire her)! Ayanami is where its at!" Anime-Shinji: *NOW he gets mad* "WHAT?! Don't talk badly about Asuka; she's teh HAWTness! Or else I'll..." Manga-Shinji: "Or else what...?" Anime-Shinji: *Taken aback* "Um, uh, let's see, well... *pause* Exactly!" Manga-Shinji: "......" Even I think I suck! Second one: Anime-Shinji: So....do you like...stuff? Manga-Shinji: ....Meh. *shrugs* SUDDENLY Anime-Asuka, Manga-Asuka, all 3 GoS2 Asukas(26, game, manga), ISRP game Asuka: Shinji~~! Anime-Shinji: *Bluuuusshhh* A...Asuka...Clones... *Nosebleed* Anime-Asuka: I've decided! Anime-Shinji: Decided...? Anime-Asuka: I'll be your Main Course if you promise to always love me and only me! Anime-Shinji: *replying as she still talks* I'll do it. Anime-Asuka: Really? Shinji, I'm so happy! The two anime lovers hug. Manga-Asuka: Oh. My. GOD. You two actually LIKE eachother?! :shock: GoS2 manga Asuka: So this is Anime-Shinji? Hmmm...GoS2 manga-Shinji really IS like his anime-counterpart. GoS2 episode 26 Asuka: At least he's not a pervert like the one I know. Happy because he stared at RIAO's panties; I can't believe it! :x GoS2 game Asuka: I...slept with the Shinji I know... :oops: ISRP game Asuka: WHAT?! How come there isn't that option in the game I'm from? :( Manga-Shinji: Screw this; I'm going to where all the different versions Ayanami, Kaworu-kun, and Misato-san are. *disappears in a puff of logic*

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Thu Jul 26, 2007 2:37 pm Manga Shinji- I am cooler. Anime Shinji- Misato and Asuka are real characters in my world. Not just people writen out of the story by a Rei fanboy who wants me to sleep with my mother. Manga Shinji- .... Anime Shinji- Did I mention both of them offered to have sex with me? Manga Shinji- I fail at life. Anime Shinji- You and all versions of Karowu.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Jul 26, 2007 2:45 pm @ Hunter21: It's official, I love you, too. :mrgreen: (*gasp* I'm going behind Reichu's back after declaring my love, oh noes!) ....I'll stop being silly now. that's just kinda creepy. Seriously though, that was like, the best thing against Manga-Shinji I've ever read. shinesmancolbat's was pretty funny, too.

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Thu Jul 26, 2007 5:31 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: @ Hunter21: It's official, I love you, too... Seriously though, that was like, the best thing against Manga-Shinji I've ever read.

[]:             Quote Post by Trigger's Elysium » Thu Jul 26, 2007 5:40 pm How was dub Shinji any different from sub Shinji?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Jul 26, 2007 5:45 pm Trigger's Elysium wrote: How was dub Shinji any different from sub Shinji?

[]:             Quote Post by Trigger's Elysium » Thu Jul 26, 2007 5:49 pm Well that's because Spike has a terrible Shinji voice. Thankfully, I watched it subbed the first time. The only time I ever really felt like strangling the guy was...yeah, about 1/4 through EoE.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Jul 26, 2007 5:49 pm To paraphrase what a THAT BOARD member said: Spike's Shinji is a whiny insecure Emo-snot who you hope that Angels kill, while Ogata's Shinji is a tormented boy with occasional moments of courage. ....I really wish I had the direct quote on-hand. ; Personally, I always found Dub-Shinji to be a wannabe Manga-Shinji who failed miserably.

[]:             Quote Post by shinesman_cobalt » Thu Jul 26, 2007 6:08 pm Uhh, can we talk about the topic now? :?

[]:             Quote Post by Tokpile Quohog » Thu Jul 26, 2007 6:57 pm Manga Rei: You are like me. Anime Rei: ................(walks away)

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Jul 26, 2007 7:04 pm Anime-Asuka: ....A test-tube baby? Oh, please.... :roll: Manga-Asuka: :x

[]:             Quote Post by Trigger's Elysium » Thu Jul 26, 2007 7:17 pm Anime-Kaworu: Excuse me, sir. Manga-Kaworu: ? Anime-Kaworu: Would you please remove your hands from that cat's neck? It looks like you're hurting it. Manga-Kaworu: I'm sorry. I'm just evil, you know. Personally, after the NAMBLA meeting, I think i'll settle in for the night... Anime-Kaworu: Delightfully evil, these lilim. Manga-Kaworu: Indeed. *both start making out*

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Jul 26, 2007 7:32 pm ^ We have a winner!

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Sat Sep 01, 2007 6:57 am We have a

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Sep 01, 2007 10:00 pm The above Kaworu conversation reminds me of this fanart (was made by a ANF member who had some cool idea for a Kaworu doujinshi from what I remember reading...Dunno what came out of that though): Anyway.... Anime-Shinji: I...I just want to die already... *intakes shuddery breath* Rebuild-Shinji: Oh yeah, well I want to die more then you! I actually came THIS close to jumping, you, um...Uh...non-jumper! Anime-Shinji: I have a back-bone now despite my severely depressed state of mind?! That's no fair; what about ME? Rebuild-Shinji: I dunno, lol. Hey...wanna go bother Manga-Shinji? Anime-Shinji: Why not? I do whatever I'm told, afterall. Oh, and I like the part when he stops moving. *The two dramatically wander off into the blood-red sunset* The bother/stop moving stuff comes from Potter Puppet Pals. Though I haven't really seen Harry Potter movies/read any of the books, this is hilarious ! ^_

[]:             Quote Post by Incisivis » Sat Sep 01, 2007 10:56 pm [Unfunny] I must be strange, then: I started with the dub and grew to like Shinji from there, yet loathe manga Shinji. He reminds me too much of the various "fanboy fantasy" Shinjis created by bitter geeks. :x In short, he bugs me as much as anime-Shinji bugs everyone else. I don't consider characters separate just becuase they've got different voices, just in different storylines of the series. There's no dub-Shinji or sub-Shinji to me, and the hatred that North American fans have got towards him isn't entirely the fault of an adaptation. And yeah, I had that knee-jerk "Evil Manga Kaworu!" thing going on for a while, but you know? I think on some levels, manga-Kaworu is an extension of the anime character. On SOME. And the other characters? I wasn't really payin' attention. Even what I know about manga-Kaworu is only secondhand, given that I dont' want to bother with Sadamoto's manga. If my favourite characters are distorted in unappealing ways, then, well what've I got left? [/Unfunny] Uh, um, okay, what do I do to make this post funny? Oh, to hell with it.... *shuffles off*

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Sep 02, 2007 12:24 am In short, he [Manga-Shinji] bugs me as much as anime-Shinji bugs everyone else.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Sun Sep 02, 2007 2:05 am Sailor Star Dust wrote: Though I guess that's really more a fault of the dub writers and not so much the voice-actors...?
